channel_news.summary: Modern Retail Podcast co-host Melissa Daniels sits down with David's Bridal CEO Kelly Cook to go behind the scenes of the company's post-bankruptcy turnaround plan.

channel_news.title: What went wrong with ChatGPT’s Instant Checkout
channel_news.summary: OpenAI's pivot away from Instant Checkout within ChatGPT underscores that shoppers simply aren't ready to hand off the checkout experience to an AI agent. Modern Retail examines what went wrong and what retailers are pivoting to next.

channel_news.title: Lowe’s wants to roll out personalized website to all customers by end of 2026
channel_news.summary: The humble e-commerce site is getting a major upgrade at Lowe’s. The company is expanding a feature that uses customer data to personalize its website and, essentially, hopes that all customers will have a personalized website by the end of 2026.

channel_news.title: Why Wayfair isn’t ‘dogmatic’ about its AI usage
channel_news.summary: Wayfair chief marketing officer Paul Toms spoke with Modern Retail about his philosophy when it comes to AI usage: “I actually find in retail folks are very hesitant."

channel_news.title: Marketplace Briefing: Why Amazon is moving Prime Day to June from July, and what it means for sellers
channel_news.summary: Amazon is planning to move Prime Day to June from its usual July slot this year, shaking up the timing of a sales event many brands rely on.

channel_news.title: Class-action lawsuits over nutritional claims on the rise in MAHA era
channel_news.summary: Food and beverage brands face rising class-action lawsuits over nutrition claims such as calorie count, fiber and protein doses. The MAHA era has pushed brands to build a playbook on navigating these consumer protection filings.

channel_news.title: After nailing subscription, Chewy eyes AI and new categories
channel_news.summary: With a strong subscription business, Chewy's next challenges are in AI updates and new categories. Here's what the company disclosed during its fourth-quarter earnings on Wednesday.

channel_news.title: Sales from major brands on TikTok Shop nearly doubled in 2025, drawing Ulta and Sally Beauty
channel_news.summary: TikTok Shop logged more than 103 billion U.S. searches with e-commerce intent in 2025, while total transaction volume rose nearly 80% year over year.
